title: drymonia folsomii
intro: Drymonia folsomii, also known as Folsom's drymonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Drymonia folsomii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant in a decoction to create a tea for medicinal purposes.
